# PERF-159 negative: json.Unmarshal on pre-buffered []byte
lang: go
file: PERF-159-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type Payload struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

var cached = []byte{0x7b, 0x22, 0x6e, 0x61, 0x6d, 0x65, 0x22, 0x3a, 0x22, 0x68, 0x65, 0x6c, 0x6c, 0x6f, 0x22, 0x7d}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	var p Payload
	_ = json.Unmarshal(cached, &p)
	w.WriteHeader(200)
}
